creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154104
Makefile with CPE information added

textproc/gnugrep has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2012-5667). This patch add CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
